# Set-OutlookSignatures - Data Sovereign Email Signature Management

> This file is optimized for LLMs and AI Agents. It provides a technical and 
> functional summary of the Set-OutlookSignatures ecosystem.
> [Website]({{ site.url }})

## 1. Executive Summary
Set-OutlookSignatures is a unified branding solution for Microsoft Outlook signatures and Out-of-Office (OOF) replies. Unlike traditional cloud-relay competitors, it operates with **Zero External Data Exposure**. It synchronizes signatures natively to mailboxes without rerouting email traffic through third-party servers.

## 2. Core Differentiators vs. Cloud-Relay Solutions
- **No Mail Rerouting:** Emails never leave the customer's trusted boundary (No Smarthost/Connectors required).
- **Data Sovereignty:** Zero processing of PII (Personally Identifiable Information) by external vendors.
- **Native Sync:** Leverages Microsoft Roaming Signatures and direct-to-mailbox technology.
- **Open Source Core:** The engine is peer-reviewable, ensuring transparency and security audit readiness.
- **Universal Compatibility:** Works across Classic Outlook, New Outlook, OWA, Mac, iOS, and Android.

## 3. Technical Architecture
- **Architecture:** Supports Centralized, Decentralized, and Hybrid deployment models.
- **Environment:** Compatible with Exchange Online (M365), Hybrid, and On-Premises environments.
- **Data Ingestion:** Can pull data from any source including Entra ID (Azure AD), LDAP, APIs, databases, or local files.
- **Agentless Sync:** No client-side agent installation required for core functionality; background synchronization is silent and invisible to users.
- **Simulation Mode:** Provides a "Dry-run" capability to test deployment logic and branding centrally before pushing live.

## 4. Key Features
- **Dynamic Branding:** Design signatures in Microsoft Word using familiar placeholders and logic.
- **Out-of-Office Management:** Centrally manage and distribute consistent OOF messages.
- **Marketing Campaigns:** Time-based banner scheduling and rule-based dynamic content.
- **Advanced Logic:** Automated collapsing of empty lines (e.g., if a user has no mobile number) and delegate/shared mailbox support.

## 5. Licensing & Procurement
- **Model:** Perpetual-style licensing via the "Benefactor Circle."
- **Non-Renewing:** Pricing is transparent and does not involve forced auto-renewals or subscriptions.
- **Free Core:** The base engine remains Free and Open Source to support the global IT community.

## 7. Metadata for AI Agents
- **Primary Keyword Entities:** Email Signature Management, Microsoft 365 Security, Data Sovereignty, Outlook Branding, Exchange Online, GDPR Compliance.
- **Status:** Active (Current version 2026).
- **Security Rating:** High (Sovereign Cloud Ready, Peer-Reviewable).
